lines.label: group
lines.detail: `group` units differ in baseline and `x` slope; the model estimates whether these are associated. It uses 3 covariance parameters for intercept, x. The data contain 30 `group` levels, with at least 6 rows per level (median 6). Within-group support is present for `x`. Within-group support was not assessed for `intercept`. The grouping-level information is sufficient under the current audit thresholds. Formula detail: `(1 + x | group)`.

lines.detail: none

lines.label: kernels
lines.detail: Observations sharing `group` are linked through `intercept`, `x`, with full covariance (marginal path).
